title: 0guard HackQuest Required X Post
text: 0guard: a pre-wallet firewall for AI agents. It checks intent -> policy -> wallet, blocking risky live actions before any signature. Built on 0G with a mainnet receipt anchor and Storage-ready proof roots. @0G_labs @0g_CN @0g_Eco @HackQuest_ #0GHackathon #BuildOn0G
